source.reference: 7.62x39mm M43 123gr FMJ (mild steel core). APG G7 BC=0.156 (AFTE Doppler). Litz G7≈0.138. Consensus 0.148 (midpoint diverse production lots). Fackler: no reliable soft-tissue fragmentation. G7 model.
source.methodology: BC values sourced from Bryan Litz's Applied Ballistics published Doppler radar measurements and form factor analysis.
